patch_ready.title: Short actionable title
patch_ready.security_invariant: Sensitive actions and objects must be authorized against the current principal and tenant before data is returned or mutated.
remediation_steps: Add an explicit authorization check at the route, service, or policy boundary.
Add a regression test for allowed and denied principals.
patch_ready.verification: Run the regression test, rerun VibeSecurity scan or recheck, and manually re-read the affected code path.

blocked.reason: not patch-ready: validate reachability, boundary crossing, impact, and verification before remediation
